name: httprobe

summary: httprobe - Tool to find working http and https servers from a domains list

commands.name: httprobe
commands.description: Tool to find working http and https servers from a domains list

arguments.description: only try plain HTTP if HTTPS fails
arguments.raw: -prefer-https  only try plain HTTP if HTTPS fails

arguments.description: skip the default probes (http:80 and https:443)
arguments.raw: -s  skip the default probes (http:80 and https:443)

commands.raw_help:
root@kali:~# httprobe -h
 Usage of httprobe:
 -c int
   	set the concurrency level (split equally between HTTPS and HTTP requests) (default 20)
 -method string
   	HTTP method to use (default "GET")
 -p value
   	add additional probe (proto:port)
 -prefer-https
   	only try plain HTTP if HTTPS fails
 -s	skip the default probes (http:80 and https:443)
 -t int
   	timeout (milliseconds) (default 10000)

local_help.man:
httprobe(1)                 General Commands Manual                 httprobe(1)

NAME
     httprobe - Tool to find working http and https servers from a domains list

SYNOPSIS
     httprobe accepts line-delimited domains on `stdin`:

     cat domains-list.txt | httprobe [-c int] [-method string] [-p value]
     [-prefer-https] [-s] [-t int]

DESCRIPTION
     httprobe  takes  a  list  of  domains and probe for working http and https
     servers.

OPTIONS
     -c int

            set the concurrency level (split equally between HTTPS and HTTP re-
            quests) (default 20)

     -method string

            HTTP method to use (default "GET")

     -p value

            add additional probe (proto:port)

     -prefer-https

            only try plain HTTP if HTTPS fails

     -s     skip the default probes (http:80 and https:443)

     -t int

            timeout (milliseconds) (default 10000)

EXAMPLES
     cat recon/example/domains.txt | httprobe cat domains.txt | httprobe -s  -p
     https:8443

SEE ALSO
     httprobe --help

     /usr/share/doc/httprobe/README.md

                                                                    httprobe(1)

apt_metadata.description:
Take a list of domains and probe for working HTTP and HTTPS servers
This package contains a tool to test a domains list. It takes a list of
domains and probe for working http and https servers.

use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use httprobe because httprobe - Tool to find working http and https servers from a domains list.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `httprobe accepts line-delimited domains on `stdin`:` as documented upstream for httprobe.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `cat recon/example/domains.txt | httprobe cat domains.txt | httprobe -s -p https:8443` as documented upstream for httprobe.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair httprobe with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `httprobe --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
command_examples: cat recon/example/domains.txt | httprobe cat domains.txt | httprobe -s -p https:8443
